dataList.desc:
- We came to N Corp. with a lot of worries on our minds... But Butter Street, our point of arrival, wasn't particularly different from the other Backstreets we'd been to.
- I'd braced myself for those fanatic Inquisitors to swarm in on us и tear my head off me... или при least to run в someone from N Corp.'s New League of Nine Littérateurs, but nothing of the sort happened.
- From what I remember, Мерседес did say that the Inquisitors are not a major faction of N Corp., и it's not like we ran в the Littérateurs когда we arrived in this District... so that explains it.
- Butter Street's residents don't seem to care much about what we do. I'm pretty sure as long as it doesn't directly involve their daily lives, they won't give us a second glance.

- A canned product that gives the user an experience never before had, simply на eating the contents. - From what I can tell, the raw ingredient is produced in a place called "Grand Magasin Sisyphe" и the Canneries connected to it. - Apparently there's a mass-produced version of this product, made на mixing все sorts of information with the base ingredient. They give intense и stimulating experience когда consumed, и in N Corp., eating these mass-produced Canned Experiences is considered a form of entertainment like going out или dining in a restaurant. - Uh... But didn't some of the Айдишки we use drive Nails в people to harvest something from them и make Canned Experiences with it? And если this Sisyphe place is "producing" the raw ingredient, then... - The thought gave me the creeps, если I'm being honest. I did ask Мерседес about it, but he said Kromer и her Inquisitors had an outdated way of doing things... which is apparently almost never an option these days. - Мерседес read my note. The way he spoke was quite insistent—he actually emphasized that the cans don't provide any dreams или experience. Then what do they really give? Memories? What separates a memory from an experience? - There are раз когда I peek в the Sinner's memories, but those memories don't come from my own experience. Still, in that precise moment I glimpse a memory, can't I say I'm experiencing it too? Or... not? - ... Maybe this isn't a question I can answer now.

-  Moses, Team Leader of LCD On-site Investigative Reasoning (OSIR) Team, conducted research that suggests a Distortion phenomenon progresses through three stages: Early, Middle, и Late, like a disease. Hohenheim also один раз said that the fate of an Abnormality awaits при the end of the Distortion phenomenon. Does that mean that один раз the symptoms get worse beyond the late стадии, the Distortion turns в an Abnormality?
- Ezra mentioned in passing that there's also something called an "Incubation" стадии—but I don't think that distinction makes much difference если you can't directly see или feel the warning signs of a Distortion phenomenon.
- The Distortions we've encountered so far were все people turned в monstrous entities... But the Distortion phenomenon we were asked to handle this time looked more like its namesake—a "phenomenon" that covered an entire street. Ezra says it's called a "Location-type Distortion."
- After completing the contract, I was able to hear more about how a Distortion can encroach upon its environment. I think the Sinners и I have seen that happen before. There were раз когда the scenery around us changed even though we didn't enter the Fathoms of someone's Ego или the Dungeon of the Fathoms.
- Actually, didn't the same kind of thing happen with people who Effloresced their Э.Г.О...? I wonder what the difference is.

- I learned a little more about S Corp. through Bamboo-hatted Kim и Aeng-du's memories.
- S Corp. is said to be a Wing run на three Court Circles: Sal, Pi, и Ppyeo. The "Pi" Circle, the faction Kim was part of, seems to have lost considerable influence, with the "Sal" и "Ppyeo" Circles colluding.
- Саня says most of S Corp.'s scientists и technicians belonged to the "Pi" Circle. That's probably why the old League of Nine Littérateurs had to escape to T Corp.—due to an internal power struggle.
- Runaway residents are hunted down и brought back to S Corp. на Fixers called "Ch'unokkun." These refugees seem to be referred to as "Nobi," sometimes...
- I don't think the term carries the same context as the miner "slaves" we saw in the underground of J Corp. casino... but I've yet to pin down what sets them apart yet.

- Когда it was involved in a Syndicate Strife against the Kurokumo Clan, the Blade Lineage was apparently split в two groups.
- One group were those who dreamed of returning to S Corp. someday—the people who had been with Bamboo-hatted Kim since back in S Corp.
- The other group was made of people who sought only the liberty to live на their sword. Kim said that returning to S Corp. was not much of a priority for Salsus who earned their keep на brandishing their swords.
- And Kim Distorted... in the middle of все that, losing both sides. Those who chose to remain with him were killed на their own leader, и with the Blade Lineage so diminished, the Salsus who had no Пройдиpurpose left him и drifted away.
- Aeng-du's the only one who stayed на him until the end. And now, she's become an official member of the LCD.
- The Mentor survives still, but calling the Blade Lineage an organized Syndicate may be a bit of a stretch now.

- LCD's On-site Investigative Reasoning Team resolves the Distortion phenomenon на searching for what they call "Inflection Points"—in the process of which they reason out и investigate the cause of the Distortion, the situation around it, и the nature of the power it may have gained due to those circumstances.
- Meanwhile, the Bus Team's method is to open the Dungeon of the Fathoms to directly peer в the Distortion's past, или simply Suppress it using force until it turns back. And since this can't even be attempted without me, I suppose it can't be helped that Moses's team has to work in their own way.
- That said, finding these "Inflection Points" is, apparently, a task that requires a huge amount of time without Moses, who can observe the progress и warning signs of the Distortion phenomena with the naked eye. I'd say that's another kind of power irreplaceable for their team, though in a completely different direction from mine.
- Hmm... Now that I think about it, what would I look like through Moses's eyes? She said she saw "a glass-like sword of many edges" in Р.Ё.Ш.У.'s case. Considering the events that transpired following Moses's observation... maybe she could give me some clue about who I was before I lost my memories.

- Э.Г.О manifested на one's own self, rather than being extracted from Abnormalities.
- Moses's pipe can alleviate mental strain through white smoke, и the scabbard Araya turned в can select which of Р.Ё.Ш.У.'s memories are cut off на the Arayashiki когда she использует blade. This leads me to believe that Э.Г.О are not always combat-oriented.
- Если anything is shared between extracted Э.Г.О и Ахуенное Э.Г.О, it's that they seem для получения the form of weapons, armor, или tools, without exception. This seems to be where they differ most from Distortions, which transforms и warps the human body.
- Sora, the Index Apprentice of the House of Spiders, said that one needs an "unshakable conviction about what's good и evil" to Effloresce their Э.Г.О. Когда I think of Ahab и Dongrang, though... that conviction doesn't necessarily have to be "right," I suppose.
- The Э.Г.О Bamboo-hatted Kim Effloresced при the end seemed somewhat unstable. Does that mean he's still lacking conviction? Then how could he even manifest one to begin with?
- Фишмаэль conjectured that while Kim may still lack a conviction of his own, и is mired in fear и anxiety... he's slowly taking steps toward the direction he chose, и that may have helped manifesting his Э.Г.О. Если so... perhaps a person whose Efflorescence is unstable might someday Distort again один раз they are devoured на conviction и anxiety вместо этого of mastering them.
